words.meaning_en: To make pain or a problem less severe
words.example_sentence: The medicine helped alleviate her headache.
words.fill_blank: Exercise can ______ stress and improve mood.

words.meaning_en: Risky; involving potential harm or danger
words.example_sentence: Working in a chemical factory can be hazardous.

words.meaning_en: A solution to a problem; a treatment for a disease
words.example_sentence: Ginger tea is a popular home remedy for a cold.
words.fill_blank: The best ______ for stress is regular exercise.

words.meaning_en: Strong, healthy, and full of energy
words.example_sentence: A vigorous debate took place in the school parliament.
words.fill_blank: Regular exercise keeps you ______ and healthy.

words.meaning_en: Severe; of great importance; sharp in perception
words.example_sentence: She had an acute pain in her knee after the fall.
words.fill_blank: The country faces an ______ shortage of doctors.

words.hindi: महामारी / एक क्षेत्र में फैलने वाला रोग
words.meaning_en: A widespread occurrence of an infectious disease in a community
words.example_sentence: An epidemic of dengue broke out in the city last year.
words.fill_blank: Health workers quickly responded to the cholera ______.

words.meaning_en: Conditions relating to public health, especially clean water and waste disposal
words.example_sentence: Proper sanitation prevents the spread of disease.
words.fill_blank: The Swachh Bharat campaign focuses on ______.

words.meaning_en: The body's ability to resist or fight off infection and disease
words.example_sentence: Vaccines strengthen the body's immunity against dangerous diseases.
words.fill_blank: A healthy diet and exercise help build natural ______ against illness.

words.meaning_en: A bacterium, virus, or other microorganism that causes disease
words.example_sentence: A pathogen enters the body and triggers an immune response.
words.fill_blank: Malaria is caused by a ______ transmitted through the bite of an infected mosquito.

words.meaning_en: The identification of an illness or condition through examination and tests
words.example_sentence: An early diagnosis of cancer greatly improves the chances of recovery.
words.fill_blank: The doctor made a ______ of pneumonia after examining the patient.

words.meaning_en: A disease that can spread easily from one person to another by contact
words.example_sentence: Influenza is contagious and can spread through coughing and sneezing.
words.fill_blank: Chickenpox is a ______ disease that spreads rapidly among children.
